inputs.name: additionalText
inputs.description: Defines the additional text of the component.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Defines the selected state of the component.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Defines the text of the component.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Defines the value of the component.

Use this property to associate a unique identifier with the item,
separate from the display text. This enables selecting items
programmatically via `selectedValues` on the parent MultiComboBox.

outputs.name: ui5Click
outputs.description:
Fired when the component is activated either with a mouse/tap or by using the Enter or Space key.

*Note:** The event will not be fired if the `disabled` property is set to `true`.
